Package org.mitre.synthea.world.agents.behaviors.payeradjustment

Class PayerAdjustmentRandom

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.agents.behaviors.payeradjustment.PayerAdjustmentRandom
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, IPayerAdjustment
public class PayerAdjustmentRandom extends Object implements IPayerAdjustment, Serializable
Randomized payment adjustment strategy.

      public BigDecimal adjustClaim(Claim.ClaimEntry claimEntry, Person person)
      Description copied from interface: IPayerAdjustment
      Adjust the claim entry according to this adjustment strategy.
